original_statement: "I just keep thinking of France. I just think the pace they have in that team as well will be really important and I think France will just pip Portugal."
statement_context: Prediction made by Jamie Carragher in a TikTok video for The Telegraph. He predicted France would win the 2026 FIFA World Cup, topping their group, beating Brazil in the quarter-finals, and defeating Portugal in the final.
resolution_criteria: France wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by lifting the trophy in the final match on or before 2026-07-19.
source_text_snippet: Carragher predicted France to lift the trophy in a TikTok video for The Telegraph, outlining his expectations for their path through the tournament. He also forecast Didier Deschamps' side to top their group before facing Brazil in the quarter-finals... His prediction ended with a final against Portugal, where he stated: 'I just keep thinking of France. I just think the pace they have in that team as well will be really important and I think France will just pip Portugal.'
